title: Domain Pack Manifest
description: Schema for content/manifest.yaml. Validated on every PR by .github/workflows/pack-content.yml. Loaders treat the manifest as the single source of truth for pack name, version, content format, and licenses.

name.description: Pack identifier — used as the artifact name on Maven Central and PyPI. Must be a valid name on both registries (lowercase, dashes/dots/underscores only).

version.description: SemVer 2.0 string. Major bump on entry removal/rename or breaking loader-API change; minor on additive content; patch otherwise.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Bump when a breaking change is made to this schema.

content_format.description: Format of content_file. Loaders pick a parser based on this value.

content_file.description: Filename of the content file inside content/, relative to manifest.yaml.

data.description: SPDX identifier for the data license (e.g. CC-BY-SA-4.0).

code.description: SPDX identifier for the wrapper-code license (e.g. Apache-2.0).
